_meta.title: Squla — The Ultimate Study Buddy (Q)
_meta.note: Demo preset inspired by a real, publicly-known education platform. Not a real client engagement.

clientDesc: Squla is an online educational platform designed to make learning fun for primary school children through interactive quizzes, educational videos, and gamification. Today their mascot 'Q' — the friendly blue alien / eyeball character — is just a static illustration in the UI. We want to transform Q from a flat image into a living, breathing 3D buddy that kids can actually talk to. The AI mascot will guide children through the website, play short educational mini-games, offer kid-friendly hints when they get stuck on a tough math or spelling problem, and deliver consistently safe, age-appropriate support — turning lesson time into playtime.
